footer.description: Real-time precious metals prices. Clean data, professional charts.
footer.disclaimer: The data shown is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial advice. Prices may be delayed by up to 15 minutes.

home.title: Precious metals,
home.subtitle: Real-time spot prices and clean analytics for Gold (XAU), Silver (XAG) and Platinum (XPT).

tools.title: Tools
tools.subtitle: Practical tools for analyzing and valuing precious metals. Data updated in real time.
tools.roiDesc: How much would you have earned investing in gold 5 years ago? Simulator with real data.
tools.ratioDesc: Real-time ratio with visual bar, historical zones and investment analysis.
tools.converterDesc: Gold, silver and platinum prices in EUR, GBP, CHF, JPY and 7 more currencies.
tools.comparator: Gold vs Silver vs Platinum Comparator
tools.comparatorDesc: Compare the historical performance of all three metals in a single chart.
tools.calendarDesc: Upcoming key events: FOMC, ECB, CPI, NFP and their impact on metals.
tools.technicalDesc: RSI, MACD and Bollinger Bands on precious metals price charts.

alerts.title: Smart price alerts
alerts.subtitle: Set up custom alerts for gold, silver and platinum. We'll notify you by email when your conditions are met. No spam, only what matters.
alerts.priceLevelDesc: Get notified when gold, silver or platinum reaches the price you set.
alerts.sharpMoveDesc: Automatic alert when a metal moves more than 2% in a few hours.
alerts.highLowDesc: Notification when new 52-week highs or lows are reached.
alerts.ratioAlertDesc: Alert when the gold/silver ratio enters extreme historical zones.
alerts.technicalCrossDesc: Moving average crossover and relevant technical signal alerts.
alerts.instantEmailDesc: All alerts are sent directly to your inbox. No app, no push notifications.

cookie.message: We use essential cookies and Google Analytics to understand how the site is used. We do not use advertising cookies.

errors.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. You can try reloading the page or go back to the dashboard.
errors.notFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Try going back to the dashboard or check metal prices.

metadata.title: Metalorix — Gold, Silver and Platinum Prices

metadata.alertsDesc: Set up smart price alerts for gold, silver and platinum. Get email notifications when key levels are reached.
